sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 14.93 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.14)

statement.latex: Let$N({ Z}/p{ Z})$be the group defined in Archive,~12.24 (the so-called ``Nottingham group'', or the ``Wild group''). Find relations of$N({ Z}/p{ Z})$as a pro-$p$-group (it has two generators, e.\,g.,$x+x^2$and$x/(1-x)$). Comment of 2009: for$p>2$see progress in (M.\,V.\,Ershov, J. London Math. Soc., 71 (2005), 362--378).

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory VI_BRIDGING; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
